Uses of Class
com.irurueta.units.UnitSystem

    • Uses of UnitSystem in com.irurueta.units

      Methods in com.irurueta.units that return UnitSystem 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      static UnitSystem UnitLocale.getDefault()
      Returns unit system for default locale.
      static UnitSystem UnitLocale.getFrom​(java.util.Locale locale)
      Returns unit system for provided locale.
      UnitSystem AccelerationFormatter.getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
      static UnitSystem AccelerationUnit.getUnitSystem​(AccelerationUnit unit)
      Returns unit system for provided acceleration unit.
      UnitSystem AngleFormatter.getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
      UnitSystem AngularAccelerationFormatter.getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
      UnitSystem AngularSpeedFormatter.getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
      UnitSystem DistanceFormatter.getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
      static UnitSystem DistanceUnit.getUnitSystem​(DistanceUnit unit)
      Returns unit system for provided distance unit.
      UnitSystem FrequencyFormatter.getUnitSystem()
      Returns unit system this instance will use based on its assigned locale.
      UnitSystem FrequencyFormatter.getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
      UnitSystem MagneticFluxDensityFormatter.getUnitSystem()
      Returns unit system this instance will use based on its assigned locale.

      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.

      Returns unit system this instance will use based on its assigned locale.

      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.

      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.

      Returns unit system for provided speed unit.

      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.

      Returns unit system for provided surface unit.

      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.

      Returns unit system this instance will use based on its assigned locale.

      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.

      UnitSystem WeightFormatter.getUnitSystem​(java.lang.String source)
      Gets unit system for detected unit into provided string representation of a measurement.
      static UnitSystem WeightUnit.getUnitSystem​(WeightUnit unit)
      Returns unit system for provided weight unit.
      static UnitSystem UnitSystem.valueOf​(java.lang.String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name.
      static UnitSystem[] UnitSystem.values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they are declared.
      Methods in com.irurueta.units with parameters of type UnitSystem 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      java.lang.String AccelerationFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, AccelerationUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided acceleration value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String AngleFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, AngleUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided angle value and unit using metric system.
      java.lang.String AngularAccelerationFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, AngularAccelerationUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided angular acceleration value and unit using metric system.
      java.lang.String AngularSpeedFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, AngularSpeedUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided angular speed value and unit using metric system.
      java.lang.String DistanceFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, DistanceUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided distance value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String FrequencyFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, FrequencyUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided frequency value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String MagneticFluxDensityFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, MagneticFluxDensityUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided magnetic flux density value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String MeasureFormatter.formatAndConvert​(double value, U unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided measurement value and unit using provided unit system.
      abstract java.lang.String MeasureFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, U unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided measurement value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String MeasureFormatter.formatAndConvert​(M measurement, UnitSystem unitSystem)
      Formats and converts provided measurement using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String SpeedFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, SpeedUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided speed value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String SurfaceFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, SurfaceUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided surface value and unit using provided unit system.
      java.lang.String TemperatureFormatter.formatAndConvert​(java.lang.Number value, TemperatureUnit unit, UnitSystem system)
      Formats and converts provided temperature value and unit using provided unit system.

      Formats and converts provided time value and unit.
